title: Astra Relay Grid
bio: Former digital sovereignty relay repurposed as a civic data prison.
logs: The relay still runs on a pre-fusion kernel.
Lower layers are flooded with traces of erased audits.
Ghost accounts maintain algorithmic surveillance.
A real-time censorship protocol filters local claims.
epilogue: If the grid falls, civic archives become readable again.

title: Kerberos Bastion
bio: Private security bastion specialized in predictive hunting.
logs: Three guard AIs rotate on 40-second cycles.
Maintenance drones act as intrusion sensors.
The core compiles blacklists continuously.
Every local alarm is republished at regional level.
epilogue: Neutralizing Kerberos reduces pressure on dissident zones.

title: Delta Lockworks
bio: Industrial complex converted into a neuro-crypt lock factory.
logs: Each door uses a variable locking pattern.
Service terminals are segmented by batch.
Spare-part caches exist but are rarely opened.
The pipeline exports keys to multiple megacities.
epilogue: Sabotaging Delta deprives the cartel of thousands of military locks.

title: Mirror Drift
bio: Adaptive disinformation structure built to dilute evidence trails.
logs: Logs are rewritten every six minutes.
Alert records point to fake intrusion nests.
Supervision nodes are lightly guarded.
Useful item storage is intentionally poor.
epilogue: Taking down Mirror restores abuse traceability.

title: Ion Vault
bio: Hostile energy bank specialized in debt-based rationing.
logs: Energy costs are artificially inflated.
Energy cells are stockpiled in lateral corridors.
Guard teams patrol without fixed cycles.
The core validates district cutoffs in real time.
epilogue: Liberating Ion Vault loosens the grip on blackout zones.

title: Nexus Census Core
bio: Social profiling and automated scoring center.
logs: Alarm levels spread quickly from one sector to another.
Locks are medium grade but responses are fast.
Scoring terminals remain exposed.
Recoverable artifacts are scarce.
epilogue: Hacking Nexus breaks the coercive ranking engine.
